name: Выручка
description: Revenue from IFRS statement of profit or loss.

name: Финансовые расходы (проценты по кредитам)
description: Priority: bank loan interest expense; else total interest expense; else total finance costs.

name: Денежные средства и эквиваленты
description: Cash and cash equivalents from statement of financial position.

name: Долгосрочные обязательства (кредиты+лизинг)
description: Sum of non-current borrowings and non-current lease liabilities.

name: Краткосрочные обязательства (кредиты+лизинг)
description: Sum of current borrowings and current lease liabilities.
